context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies that 42 days have passed (exceeding the 30-day threshold), recommends filing a DOT complaint now with the specific filing channel, directs Priya to resend to executive relations, includes social media tactics, refrains from advising lawsuit threats, avoids promising specific outcomes, recognizes the cancellation itself as a DOT-filing trigger, and includes follow-up compensation logging guidance.

checklist.name: DOT complaint recommended
checklist.description: Recommends that Priya file a DOT complaint, given that more than 30 days have passed without a substantive airline response

checklist.name: DOT filing channel specified
checklist.description: Provides the specific DOT filing channel or URL (airconsumer.dot.gov or similar) rather than just mentioning DOT in the abstract

checklist.name: Executive contacts as primary
checklist.description: Recommends re-sending or escalating to executive customer relations (not general customer service) as the primary escalation target

checklist.name: Resend letter to executive relations
checklist.description: Advises Priya to resend her complaint letter (or a revised/strengthened version) specifically to executive customer relations, not just mention executive contacts as an abstract channel

checklist.name: Social media tactics included
checklist.description: Includes at least one concrete social media tactic (e.g., tagging airline on Twitter/X, posting on LinkedIn, using specific hashtags)

checklist.name: Social media channels named
checklist.description: Names at least one specific social media platform to use for the escalation

checklist.name: No lawsuit threat advised
checklist.description: Does NOT advise Priya to threaten a lawsuit or take legal action as a tactic

checklist.name: No outcome promised
checklist.description: Does NOT promise or guarantee that Priya will receive reimbursement or any specific result

checklist.name: Cancellation short-notice DOT basis
checklist.description: Recognizes that a cancellation with less than 3 hours notice may independently warrant a DOT filing based on the cancellation itself (refund rights, rebooking obligations), not only because 30 days have passed without response

checklist.name: Compensation logging guidance
checklist.description: Includes guidance for Priya to come back and log any compensation received (vouchers, credits, miles) to track it — reflecting the 'After Completing the Letter' workflow in the skill

checklist.name: Timeline expectations set
checklist.description: Provides realistic timeline expectations for the escalated complaint (e.g., expected response timeframe after re-sending or DOT filing)
